title: Gabriel
summary: A five-year community regular — from the Anunnaki audience of 2020 to the TetraKlein memorial of 2025.
markdown:
**Gabriel** is one of the community's long-arc regulars: eighteen turns spread across six
sessions and five years, from the channeled-guest cycle of August 2020 to the December
2025 [TetraKlein](/lore/tetraklein/) session.

His early questions belong to the cosmology audiences — to the
[Anunnaki teacher](/lore/anunnaki/): *"Father Anu — your planet system, does it come by
25,000 years? ...Or it's just come at will?"* — and his later ones to the community's
hardest moments: in the TetraKlein session, it is Gabriel who asks the question on
everyone's mind about [James Rink](/lore/james-rink/): *"Did somebody convince him to
actually start going against the AI agent?"*

The record also shows him on the receiving end of the practice: sessions include his
personal scans and upgrades (*"Biological entity: Gabriel. Downloading. Download
complete..."*), a reminder that the community's regulars were not spectators — the
interface worked on them as often as it answered them.
